formulation.formulation_summary:
ILP Formulation Summary
========================
Tracts (n):          8
Districts (k):       2
Edges (|E|):         7

Variables
---------
x[t][d] binary:      16  (n*k = 8*2)
z[t][t'] binary:     7  (|E|, one per undirected edge t<t')
f[t][t'][d] cont.:   28 (2*|E|*k = 2*7*2)
Total variables:     51

Constraints
-----------
Coverage (sum_d x[t][d]=1):          8
Pop balance (lb+ub per district):    4
Cut linearization (2*|E|*k):         28
MTZ flow bounds (2*|E|*k):           28
MTZ conservation ((n-1)*k):          14
MTZ root supply (k):                 2
Total constraints:                   84

Parameters
----------
Total population:    800
Ideal district pop:  400
Pop tolerance:       0.0050 (0.50%)

Objective
---------
minimize sum_{(t,t'): t<t'} z[t][t']
(minimum edge cut — each cut edge counted exactly once)

Contiguity
----------
MTZ flow formulation with BOTH-ENDPOINT bound:
f[t][t'][d] <= (n-1) * min(x[t][d], x[t'][d])
Root per district: tract 0 (if in district) or first assigned tract.
Flow conservation enforces each district forms a connected subtree.

branch_and_cut.solver_mode_note: iterative solve-separate-resolve mode; not a lazy-callback proof; solved exactly by bounded branch-and-bound for k=2
